SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology

Class Units

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology.Units
public class Units extends Object
Utility class for parsing and converting V2 ANSI, ISO+ or UCUM unit codes.

At class-load time the unit lookup tables are populated by consulting the configured TerminologyMapper (via TerminologyMapperFactory) for:

  • ConceptMap/v2-ucum-units — maps V2 ANSI/ISO+ codes to UCUM
  • ValueSet/ucum-common-units — well-known UCUM codes and their display names
If the configured mapper does not supply either resource, the bundled classpath JSON file is used as a fallback, so a custom TerminologyMapper can selectively override one or both resources without replacing the defaults entirely. To re-initialize at runtime call initialize(TerminologyLoader).
Author:
Audacious Inquiry
See Also:
  • UCUM Common Units ValueSet

    getConceptMap()

    static Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ValueSet>

    Returns the ValueSet that was last used to populate the common-UCUM display-name table, or Optional.empty() if initialization has not yet occurred or failed.

      public static final String CONCEPT_MAP_ID
      Resource id of the ConceptMap that maps V2/ANSI/ISO+ unit codes to UCUM.

      Resource id of the ValueSet containing well-known UCUM unit codes and display names.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public static void initialize(TerminologyLoader loader)
      (Re-)initializes the unit lookup maps from the given TerminologyLoader.

      Retrieves ConceptMap/v2-ucum-units (V2 → UCUM code mappings) and ValueSet/ucum-common-units (well-known UCUM codes and display names) from the loader. Any previous map contents are discarded before population begins, so callers can use this method to hot-swap terminology data at runtime.

      The ValueSet is processed first so that its display names are available when building the ConceptMap entries.

      Parameters:
      loader - the TerminologyLoader to retrieve resources from; must not be null

    • getConceptMap

      public static Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ConceptMap> getConceptMap()
      Returns the ConceptMap that was last used to populate the V2-to-UCUM lookup table, or Optional.empty() if initialization has not yet occurred or failed.
      Returns:
      the ConceptMap/v2-ucum-units resource, or empty

    • getValueSet

      public static Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ValueSet> getValueSet()
      Returns the ValueSet that was last used to populate the common-UCUM display-name table, or Optional.empty() if initialization has not yet occurred or failed.
      Returns:
      the ValueSet/ucum-common-units resource, or empty

    • toUcum

      public static org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding toUcum(String unit)
      Convert a string in ANSI, ISO+ or UCUM units to UCUM.
      Parameters:
      unit - The string to convert to a UCUM code
      Returns:
      The Coding representing the UCUM unit

    • isUcum

      public static boolean isUcum(String unit)
      Check whether a unit string is an actual UCUM code NOTE: UCUM is a code system with a grammar, which means that codes are effectively infinite in number. This method only checks for UCUM units commonly used in medicine. The lists are extensive, but it's also possible that some value UCUM codes will be missed by this method.
      Parameters:
      unit - A string to check
      Returns:
      true if the unit is known to be UCUM, or false otherwise.
